messages.content: Search name for a YouTube channel about cooking and search for free that

Search that names are free in youtube

As an AI language model, I don't have the authority to search if the names are free on YouTube. However, you can check if a channel name is available by trying to create a YouTube channel with the name. YouTube will tell you if the name is available or not. Keep in mind that you will need to meet certain criteria to be able to create a custom channel name on YouTube.
